description: Progress Reporting / Observability - kernel/reporter.py with iteration, completion, and stuck reports; --verbose and --status flags in runner.py for human-readable output.
steps: Create kernel/reporter.py with class Reporter containing: report_iteration(state, node, result) -> str (one-line progress like '[3/30] code: wrote 2 files, tests passing'), report_completion(state, tasks) -> str (final summary: goal, iterations used, tasks completed, files written, errors encountered), report_stuck(state, node, errors) -> str (what went wrong, which node is stuck, suggestion to try), format_status(state, tasks) -> str (human-readable current status without running anything: goal, progress, current node, last errors)
Add --verbose flag to runner.py: when set, after each Mode 3 iteration prints the result of reporter.report_iteration(). After completion, always prints reporter.report_completion().
Add --status flag to runner.py: reads current state.yaml and memory/tasks.yaml, prints reporter.format_status(), exits without running. Make --goal not required when --status is used.
In the Mode 3 stuck detection branch, call reporter.report_stuck() and print its output to stderr.
After Mode 3 loop completes (end of main()), print reporter.report_completion() summary regardless of --verbose flag.
Create tests/test_reporter.py with tests for each method: various state dicts, edge cases (no tasks, all done, errors present, stuck state)
Ensure tests pass and coverage stays >= 90%
acceptance_criteria: kernel/reporter.py exists with Reporter class and all 4 methods
report_iteration produces concise one-line progress strings
report_completion produces multi-line summary with key stats
report_stuck provides actionable information about the failure
format_status shows current state without running the kernel
runner.py --verbose shows iteration-by-iteration output in Mode 3
runner.py --status --goal dummy (or without --goal) prints status and exits
All tests pass with python3.12 -m pytest tests/ --cov --cov-fail-under=90 -q
findings: All 609 tests pass with 98.62% coverage. Created kernel/reporter.py with Reporter class (4 methods: report_iteration, report_completion, report_stuck, format_status). Added --verbose and --status flags to runner.py. --status exits early without requiring --goal. --verbose prints iteration progress in Mode 3. Stuck detection in Mode 3 prints report_stuck to stderr. Completion report always prints after Mode 3 loop. Added yaml import to runner.py that was missing (needed by ralph export section). 24 new tests in test_reporter.py.
